//: SOFT reminder hook, NOT enforcement. After the orchestrator spawns a worker subagent via the Agent tool (alias Task, renamed from Task in CC 2.1.63), this PostToolUse hook runs verify-reminder.sh, which injects a non-blocking additionalContext nudge to run the verification gate (spawn the `verifier` subagent) for high-stakes work. It emits {} when the spawned agent IS the verifier, to avoid a verify-the-verifier loop. The matcher covers both the current tool name (Agent) and its legacy alias (Task).

hooks.//SessionEnd: Self-learning loop: at session end, append an entry to the per-project .claude/journal/<date>-<session>.md file and drop a .claude/.skill-update-pending marker so the next SessionStart knows to prompt a debrief.
hooks.//SessionStart: Self-learning loop: at session start, check .skill-update-pending and the <!-- learning --> count in LEARNINGS.md. Emits an additionalContext nudge to debrief+capture (Branch B) or a reconcile-pass prompt when the learning delta hits the threshold (Branch A, default 10). Silent otherwise (Branch C). Suppressed on context-compaction restarts.
